items_ai.title: For writing and editing, plain vanilla Claude web is still the best (vs Codex and Claude Code). My guess is something in the coding agent's system prompts make them crappier writers.
items_ai.title_original: For writing and editing, plain vanilla Claude web is still the best (vs Codex and Claude Code). My guess is something in the coding agent's system prompts make them crappier writers.
items_ai.title_en: For writing and editing, plain vanilla Claude web is still the best (vs Codex and Claude Code). My guess is something in the coding agent's system prompts make them crappier writers.
items_ai.title_zh: 对于写作和编辑来说，普通的 Claude Web 仍然是最好的（相对于 Codex 和 Claude Code）。我的猜测是编码代理的系统提示中的某些内容使他们成为更糟糕的作家。
